message:
test(search-core): add 31 tests for vector index infrastructure

Expand vector_index.rs from 17 to 48 tests covering:
- VectorHit: constructor, serde roundtrip, PartialEq semantics
  (ignores index_position), NaN score ordering safety
- VectorMetadata: new+builders, Default, serde roundtrip with
  extra metadata
- VectorFilter: by_model, combined all-criteria filter, Default
  is_empty, serde roundtrip, model mismatch rejection
- VectorIndexConfig: default values (384 dim, unlimited), serde
  roundtrip
- VectorIndex: Default trait, config accessor, max_vectors
  enforcement (rejects at capacity including existing-entry
  update), get returns None for missing, query dimension mismatch
  error
- IndexEntry: L2 normalization (3-4-5 triangle verification)
- VectorIndexStats: serde roundtrip, empty index stats
- dot_product: identical unit vectors (1.0), orthogonal (0.0),
  empty vectors
- Search: k=0 returns empty, exclusion filter, multiple doc
  kinds filter, remove-then-search consistency
- Remove: swap-remove preserves index correctness, search works
  after middle-entry removal
- estimated_memory: zero on empty, positive on populated

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
